title: SP Municipalities Liveability Tool
subtitle: Liveability scores for 645 São Paulo municipalities
description:
This dataset contains liveability scores and raw indicators for all 645 municipalities in São Paulo State, Brazil.

## Files

- `sp_municipalities_livability.csv` — composite liveability score and rank per municipality
- `sp_municipalities_data.csv` — raw merged indicators (population, GDP, IDHM, forest coverage, climate)
- `sp_municipalities_exploration.ipynb` — full analysis notebook

## Indicators

| Indicator | Source |
|---|---|
| Population (2022 Census) | IBGE SIDRA |
| GDP & GDP per capita | IBGE SIDRA |
| Human Development Index (IDHM) | IPEADATA |
| Forest / vegetation coverage | MapBiomas Collection 10 |
| Mean temperature, precipitation, humidity | INMET |
| Territorial area | IBGE SIDRA |
